title: Extracting Phone Numbers from a String
scenario: Write a prompt to extract phone numbers from a given string. The string may contain multiple phone numbers. The output should be a list of extracted phone numbers.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to JavaScript syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the phone numbers from the given string.
